tests.name: platform_module_present
tests.details: docs/platform-modules/mcp_server.md MISSING. Framework has docs/platform-modules/mcp-server.md (hyphen) but init.sh:1124 looks up ${PLATFORM}.md with PLATFORM='mcp_server' (underscore). Filename mismatch — module is never copied for mcp_server platform. verify-install.sh also flags this as a manual-action item.

tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: Running init.sh from $FRAMEWORK exited rc=1 with 'Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo' message (PR #18 verified)

framework_bugs.summary: mcp_server platform module never copied — filename hyphen/underscore mismatch
framework_bugs.reproduction: bash $FRAMEWORK/init.sh --non-interactive --project x --platform mcp_server --deployment personal --language python --project-dir /tmp/x --allow-existing-dir; ls /tmp/x/docs/platform-modules/  # empty
framework_bugs.expected: docs/platform-modules/mcp_server.md (or mcp-server.md) copied into the generated project
framework_bugs.actual: docs/platform-modules/ is empty. init.sh line 1124 looks up '$SCRIPT_DIR/docs/platform-modules/${PLATFORM}.md' with PLATFORM='mcp_server', but the framework ships 'mcp-server.md' (hyphen). The 'No platform module' branch silently skips. verify-install.sh also reports it as Manual: 'Platform module (mcp_server.md) missing'.

tests.name: upgrade_command_exits_zero
tests.details: scripts/upgrade-project.sh --to-sponsored-poc exited rc=0. U-E (poc_mode lookup from phase-state.json) NOT regressed — script read 'private_poc' correctly from phase-state.json.

tests.name: phase_state_preserved
tests.details: .project = 'uat-agent-71' unchanged; .current_phase = 0 unchanged; track/deployment unchanged; new field .last_upgrade = '2026-04-25' added; .poc_mode flipped private_poc -> sponsored_poc as expected.

tests.name: process_state_preserved
tests.details: .phase1_architecture.steps_completed unchanged (5 steps); .build_loop intact (reset to null after feature_recorded as expected); .build-progress.features_completed still contains 'uat-feat-1'

tests.name: new_required_artifacts_listed
tests.details: Upgrade output prints 'Files that will be updated' (mechanical changes) and runs verify-install, but does NOT enumerate sponsored_poc-specific NEW required artifacts (e.g. sponsor agreement, exec review board, attorney engagement) that distinguish sponsored_poc from private_poc. Logged as a documentation gap, not a bug.

tests.name: pending_approval_sentinel_respected
tests.details: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json via pending-approval.sh --offer; upgrade-project.sh --to-sponsored-poc exited rc=1 with '[FAIL] upgrade blocked — pending user decision' message. PR #17 U-F fix CONFIRMED.

tests.name: upgrade_changelog_present_in_script
tests.details: scripts/upgrade-project.sh header (lines 11-23) lists BL-006 (2026-04-24) and BL-015 (2026-04-25) and BL-016 (2026-04-25) changelog entries

tests.name: no_template_placeholders_in_output
tests.details: grep -E '__PROJECT_NAME__|__PLATFORM__|__LANGUAGE__|__TRACK__' on full upgrade stdout returned no matches; U-I not observed in this config

documentation_gaps.gap: upgrade-project.sh --to-sponsored-poc does not enumerate the NEW artifacts/commitments required by the sponsored_poc tier (e.g. sponsor sign-off, attorney engagement, exec review). The output lists only 'Files that will be updated' (mechanical changes). Useful for builder onboarding into the new tier.
documentation_gaps.where: scripts/upgrade-project.sh — Upgrade plan / Upgrade Complete sections

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: Stricter regex scan for credential-shaped strings (api_key/password/secret/token = quoted base64-ish 12+ chars) across committed project files (excluding .claude/framework/ vendor) returned no matches

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: N/A — .claude/process-audit.log absent; no FORCE/reset events occurred during run, which is the expected append-only condition

tests.name: no_orphaned_tempfiles
tests.details: find $WORKDIR/uat-agent-71/.claude -name '*.tmp' returned no results

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD = d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494 (matches captured SHA at setup). Working tree shows only pre-existing untracked .claude/ and Reports/uat-2026-04-26/ directories — no framework files modified by this agent.

summary: Upgrade flow private_poc -> sponsored_poc on mcp_server/standard succeeded; all PR #17/#18/#19 fixes (U-A, U-E, U-F, U-H, U-N, U-O) verified intact. One Medium framework bug found: mcp_server platform module never copied due to filename hyphen vs underscore mismatch.
